question: Show the 50 most recent open sales orders for a given customer
sql:
SELECT TOP (50) so.order_no, so.order_date, so.customer_id, so.order_status
FROM sales_order so
WHERE so.customer_id = @CustomerId
  AND so.order_status IN ('O', 'OPEN')
ORDER BY so.order_date DESC;
notes: Illustrative only — replace table/column names with objects from sql_p21_db.csv for your environment.
